items.title: Prediction: This Artificial Intelligence (AI) Stock Will Be the Nvidia of Quantum Computing by 2035
items.description: Nvidia currently dominates the artificial intelligence (AI) boom, but another big-tech peer could be better positioned for the rise of quantum applications.

items.title: Android Game Developers in the US Can Now Retain up to 95% of Revenue Starting October 22 With Xsolla Buy Button
items.description: LOS ANGELES, October 07, 2025--Xsolla, a global commerce company helping developers launch, grow, and monetize their games, today announces the availability of its Buy Button for Android. This SDK solution enables mobile game developers to launch direct payments from within their Android games to a web-based checkout that is fully compliant with evolving U.S. regulations, thanks to various rulings in the Epic Games v. Google antitrust case and in line with the precedent set by Epic Games v. Appl

items.title: How To Pick the Next Apple Stock, According to Warren Buffett
items.description: What key details did Buffett see in Apple that you could apply to your future investments?

items.title: Apple's Headset Strategy and Tesla's EV Sales Windfall
items.description: We discuss what Apple and Meta Platforms see as the future of tech hardware and whether Tesla's latest delivery boon is a peak for the company.

items.title: Strategy Ranks Among Top Five U.S. Corporate Treasuries With $80B in Bitcoin Holdings
items.description: Strategy Inc. (NASDAQ: MSTR) continues to cement its position as one of the largest institutional holders of Bitcoin, ranking fifth among U.S. corporate treasuries with approximately $80 billion in digital assets, according to company data and recent regulatory filings. Closing in on the #2 spot among all U.S. corporate treasuries. ...
